name: claude-code-usage
title: Claude Code Usage
description: Live Claude Code session and weekly usage limits.
author: narayann7

commands.name: usage
commands.title: Claude Usage
commands.subtitle: Claude Code
commands.description: List view of session and weekly usage with bars and reset times.

commands.name: usage-menubar
commands.title: Claude Usage Menu Bar
commands.subtitle: Claude Code
commands.description: Compact menu bar title showing weekly and session usage.

preferences.name: userAgent
preferences.title: User-Agent Override
preferences.description: Optional User-Agent for the usage endpoint. Leave empty to use the pinned default.

preferences.name: cacheSeconds
preferences.title: Cache Seconds
preferences.description: How long a successful response is cached before refetching.

preferences.name: titleWindows
preferences.title: Menu Bar Title Shows
preferences.description: Which windows appear in the menu bar title.
